title: The Wolf
description: This mod simply adds "Death" from the "Puss in boots: the last wish" movie
body:
Adds "Death" from the "Puss in boots: the last wish" movie
Requires Forge 1.20.1 and Geckolib 4, is compatible with Optifine shaderpacks.
Configurations for spawning are located in wolfmod-common.toml
